intro: Stephen has compiled a collection of trusted resources to support your mental health journey. These tools complement the therapeutic work we do together, but are not substitutes for professional help if you're experiencing distress.

books.title: The Compassionate Mind
books.author: By Paul Gilbert
books.description: Based on Compassion-Focused Therapy, this book offers techniques to develop self-compassion and overcome self-criticism.

books.title: The Body Keeps the Score
books.author: By Bessel van der Kolk
books.description: Explores the effects of trauma on the body and mind, and offers pathways to recovery and healing.

books.title: Unwinding Anxiety
books.author: By Judson Brewer
books.description: Science-based approach to breaking the cycle of worry and fear to heal the anxious mind.

books.title: No Self, No Problem
books.author: By Chris Niebauer
books.description: How neuropsychology is helping us understand mindfulness and the benefits of present-moment awareness.

apps.name: Headspace
apps.description: Guided meditation and mindfulness practices for stress reduction and improved focus.

apps.name: Calm
apps.description: Sleep stories, meditation, and relaxation techniques to improve sleep and reduce anxiety.

apps.name: MoodKit
apps.description: CBT-based activities and mood tracking to help manage depression and anxiety.

apps.name: Woebot
apps.description: AI chatbot that uses CBT principles to help you track and manage your mood.

apps.name: Calm Harm
apps.description: Provides strategies and alternatives for those at risk of deliberate self-harm, offering immediate support when needed.

websites.name: HSE Mental Health
websites.description: Information about HSE mental health services, including how to access support and resources for mental wellbeing.

websites.name: ADHD Ireland
websites.description: Support and information for people with ADHD and their families, with resources for children and adults.

websites.name: AsIAm
websites.description: Ireland's national autism charity, providing support, advocacy, and information for the autism community.

websites.name: Psychological Society of Ireland
websites.description: Professional body for psychology in Ireland with resources for finding psychologists and information about psychological issues.

websites.name: Jigsaw
websites.description: Ireland's national centre for youth mental health, providing support for young people aged 12–25.

websites.name: Mental Health Ireland
websites.description: National organisation promoting positive mental health and wellbeing to all individuals and communities in Ireland.

items.title: Anxiety Management Toolkit
items.description: Practical exercises and techniques for managing anxiety symptoms in daily life.

items.title: Thought Record Worksheet
items.description: A CBT-based worksheet for identifying and challenging unhelpful thought patterns.

items.title: Mindfulness Practice Guide
items.description: Introduction to mindfulness with simple exercises to incorporate into your routine.

items.title: Sleep Hygiene Checklist
items.description: Tips and strategies for improving sleep quality and establishing healthy sleep habits.

items.title: Emotional Regulation Skills
items.description: DBT-inspired techniques for managing intense emotions effectively.

items.title: Self-Compassion Exercises
items.description: Activities to develop a kinder relationship with yourself and reduce self-criticism.

items.title: Teen Stress Management Guide
items.description: Age-appropriate strategies for managing school, social, and family stress.

items.title: Social Anxiety Toolkit for Teens
items.description: Practical exercises to build confidence in social situations.

items.title: Mood Tracking for Teens
items.description: Simple tools to help teenagers understand and monitor their emotional patterns.

items.title: Building Healthy Friendships
items.description: Guidance on developing and maintaining positive peer relationships.

items.title: Exam Anxiety Management
items.description: Strategies to cope with academic pressure and test anxiety.

items.title: Supporting Your Anxious Child
items.description: Evidence-based strategies to help children manage anxiety and build resilience.

items.title: Positive Parenting Strategies
items.description: Practical approaches to discipline and behaviour management that strengthen relationships.

items.title: Understanding Neurodivergent Children
items.description: A guide for parents supporting children with ADHD, autism, and other neurodivergent traits.

items.title: Teen Mental Health Warning Signs
items.description: How to recognise when your teenager may need professional support.
